code:
import io
import string

type Light =
  | Red
  | Green
  | Yellow

fn next_state(_ light: Light) -> Light
  match light
  when Red
    Light.Green
  when Green
    Light.Yellow
  when Yellow
    Light.Red
  end
end

fn state_name(_ light: Light) -> String
  match light
  when Red
    "Red"
  when Green
    "Green"
  when Yellow
    "Yellow"
  end
end

fn main() -> Result<Unit, String>
  let line = match io.read_line()
  when Some(l)
    l
  when None
    ""
  end

  let tokens = string.split_whitespace(line)
  mut state = Light.Red
  mut i = 0
  while i < tokens.len()
    let tok = match tokens.get(i)
    when Some(t)
      t
    when None
      ""
    end
    if tok == "next"
      state = next_state(state)
    end
    i = i + 1
  end

  print(state_name(state))
  Ok(())
end
